spec_match.rationale: The generator still targets macOS 12 users for Chrome 151 messaging and now emits accessible, dismissible banner markup.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified tone/audience changes, generated snippet content, dismiss persistence, and reset behavior.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now delivers deployable banner HTML rather than only a visual mock-up.

edge_cases.rationale: The previous ARIA and dismiss-state gap is covered with role, aria-live, a dismiss button, and localStorage persistence in the generated snippet.

design_system.rationale: The added buttons and dismissed-state preview use existing CSS variables and associated labels.

summary: Re-tested in Chrome Canary through chrome-devtools-mcp at /v151/chrome-will-remove-support-for-macos-12/update-banner-preview/: critical/admin output used role=alert and aria-live=assertive, the snippet included data-dismiss-banner and localStorage persistence, dismiss stored state and hid the preview, reset restored it, and console/network output was clean.
